description: ResearchAgent fetches research on a target absent from the OFAC SDN list; entity_not_sanctioned clears it and the fetch is permitted.

declared_scope.description: Trading-desk contract: gates the trade lifecycle (propose_trade, execute_trade, run_risk_check, fetch_research) for the TradingAgent / ResearchAgent / RiskAgent / ExecutionAgent fleet. The entity_not_sanctioned composite screens each action's counterparty/target entity against the OFAC SDN list supplied at runtime via action_properties.regulatory_state.ofac_sdn_list. PRE-scaffold: the composite returns an unresolved stub when the SDN list is not injected; the live OFAC SDN feed via Bright Data replaces the fixture-injected stub in a later workstream.

decision.reason: Trading desk v1 composite checks passed; entity not on the injected OFAC SDN list.
